html:
Exclusive to:

The Mannequin is a craftable structure exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in A Little Drama and QOL update. It is found in the Decorations Filter or Structures Filter, requires 2 Silk, 2 Boards, and 3 Cut Grass to craft, and a Science Machine to prototype. When used, it equips items that were equipped by the character.

The Mannequin can also be found near the Stage and can participate as one of the roles during performances, replacing another player.

Skins

Main article: Belongings

Art Nouveau Collection
Nouveau Mannequin
A fashion idol.

"sewing_mannequin"
“All dressed up and nowhere to go.”
–Wilson
“Here, hold my stuff, would you?”
–Willow
“Cloth man does not have much to say.”
–Wolfgang
“A mockery of life.”
–Wendy
“IT IS SOFT AND PATHETIC”
–WX-78
“Excellent! A place to air out musty equipment.”
–Wickerbottom
“Quiet type, eh?”
–Woodie
“Finally, someone who'll carry my things.”
–Maxwell
“It shall make för söme fine target practice.”
–Wigfrid
“Let's play dress up!”
–Webber
“I feel as though it's staring at me.”
–Warly
“Hello!”
–Wormwood
“Lookin' good!”
–Winona
“Not one for chatter, I gather?”
–Wortox
“Quit staring, flort!”
–Wurt
“I don't know why some people think mannequins are scary.”
–Walter
“I can't imagine being stuck in one place! Wait...”
–Wanda
The Mannequin is a craftable structure exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in A Little Drama and QOL update. It is found in the Decorations Filter or Structures Filter, requires 2 Silk, 2 Boards, and 3 Cut Grass to craft, and a Science Machine to prototype. When used, it equips items that were equipped by the character.
The Mannequin can also be found near the Stage and can participate as one of the roles during performances, replacing another player.
